text.title: langchain Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for langchain as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using `.with_retry()` on chains without distinguishing transient errors from logic errors.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Blind retry amplifies costs without fixing root cause. Rate limit errors need backoff; logic errors need prompt fixes, not retries.

failure-mode.description: Using LLMChain, AgentExecutor, ConversationChain, or SequentialChain from legacy LangChain.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These are deprecated but still widely documented on Stack Overflow. Agents trained on web data will suggest them. Use LCEL equivalents: `prompt | model | parser`, `create_react_agent`, `RunnableWithMessageHistory`, LCEL pipe chain.

failure-mode.description: LCEL operator (`|`) produces hard-to-debug stack traces when intermediate steps fail; error messages point to internal chain internals, not your code.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always test components individually first to isolate bugs.

failure-mode.description: `create_react_agent()` has no built-in iteration cap — agents loop indefinitely on ambiguous tasks without custom `stop_sequence` or max_iterations config.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: LangGraph state serialization fails silently for custom non-serializable objects in state.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always use JSON-serializable types in StateGraph.

failure-mode.description: LangSmith tracing adds ~30ms latency per chain call.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Using a custom `CallbackHandler` with blocking I/O in an async chain.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LangChain callbacks execute synchronously in async chains by default. A blocking callback stalls the entire chain. Use `AsyncCallbackHandler` instead.

failure-mode.description: Using `batch()` with tools that are not thread-safe.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LCEL `batch()` runs in a thread pool by default. Non-thread-safe tools cause race conditions. Use `abatch()` with async tools instead.

failure-mode.description: `create_react_agent` internally uses `MessagesState` — adding custom state fields requires a custom graph, not the prebuilt agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: If you need custom state, define your own StateGraph instead of extending create_react_agent.

failure-mode.description: Providing ambiguous or overlapping tool descriptions without testing tool selection explicitly.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The LLM reads tool descriptions verbatim. Ambiguous descriptions cause the agent to select wrong tools without error. Wrong tool selection fails silently.
